title: project: untitled alpha
body:
## ~~Description removed~~
The project aims to create a mysterious alpha version of Minecraft, filled with secrets, fear, a sense of persecution and liminality. Feel the experience of a corrupted Minecraft, filled with cliched yet still disturbing folklore of old creepypastas. And remember: **you are not alone here**.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-VYeJYpXMFA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## NECESSARILY:
- Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.20.1_HD_U_I6.jar) to install shaders and ensure correct operation of resource packs and some mods.


## Recommendations:
- Use alpha/beta **resource pack**:
> This mod pack includes the resource pack "[Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days)". It is optimal, but if for some reason you do not like it - you can install "[NostalgiaCraft](https://minecraft-inside.ru/resource-packs/166397-nostalgiacraft.html)" from the author ThunderTeam. "NostalgiaCraft" is NOT in the modpack.
<details>
<summary>Correct installation of resource pack</summary>

"Golden Days Base" is mandatory, "Golden Days Alpha" is optional.  
!["Golden Days Base" is mandatory, "Golden Days Alpha" is optional.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/213289bbb92cfcb67179a00cae985fcbfd196aa8.png)
![NostalgiaCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e48ab2d4b0b798a680db9f25ff1cc0e57a52a549.png)

</details>

- **Use shaders** for atmosphere:
> There are several shaders in the mod pack. You can also choose to your taste, but I can recommend "MC VHS". Ignore shader errors such as "gbuffers". This does not affect the game in any way. This also applies to OpenGL errors. They can be disabled in the Optifine settings.
- Play **singleplayer**:
>   The pack is designed for singleplayer. However, if you really want, you can play multiplayer, but mods may have various errors and some scenarios may not work.
- Turn off the "**smooth lighting**" in the graphics settings;
- **Render distance** from 8 to 12:
> The smaller, the more authentic;
- Installing [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) is at your own risk:
> TBS is a standalone mod that doesn't like to interact with other mods. In my opinion, it's redundant in this collection, but if you really want it, try it!
- **Play!**
> Play a lot, go through Minecraft, because mods do not interfere with the game. Develop, study, be afraid, be scared and be surprised!
